entity.summary: Dutch crypto broker and exchange-service platform that decided to cease operations in 2023 and offered customers a transfer path to Bitvavo.
entity.notes: LiteBit announced a wind-down and customer transfer process to Bitvavo. Bitvavo is not yet modeled as a successor entity in HEI, so successor_id is omitted. Death date follows the stated customer action and transfer deadline.

events.title: LiteBit founded
events.description: LiteBit operated as a Dutch crypto broker and exchange-service platform, commonly described as founded in 2013.
events.notes: Year-level date based on public profile references.

events.title: Cease of operations announced
events.description: LiteBit announced it would terminate its activities, citing market developments, increased competition, and regulatory pressure, and offered customers a transfer path to Bitvavo.
events.notes: Death date is set to the stated 2023-08-14 customer action and transfer deadline rather than the announcement date.

evidence.title: LiteBit profile
evidence.notes: Used for exchange profile and founding-year context.

evidence.title: FAQ Cease of operations
evidence.notes: Official support FAQ describing cease-of-operations handling and the 2023-08-14 customer deadline.

evidence.title: Bitvavo welcomes new clients from crypto broker LiteBit
evidence.notes: Bitvavo notice quoting LiteBit's decision to end activities and offer a customer transfer option.

evidence.title: ACM approves acquisition of LiteBit customer base by Bitvavo
evidence.notes: Used for customer-base transfer approval and cease-operations context.
